title: room_hpke_keypair exposes shared group secret, breaking intra-group sealed-sender
description: mls.rs room_hpke_keypair returns (secret_bytes, public_bytes) where secret_bytes is an MLS epoch exporter shared by all group members. Any group member can therefore unseal messages sealed to the group key, including those from other members. The sealed_broadcast mechanism using this key hides sender identity from the relay but not from group members — any member can impersonate any other. This is not documented as an accepted limitation in DESIGN.md and contradicts the sealed-sender privacy model.
